description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a beige exterior and white trim, featuring a symmetrical front facade with multiple windows and a central entryway. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of trees, shrubs, and a stone pathway leading to the entrance. The roof structure is flat with visible beams, suggesting either ongoing construction or a modern architectural touch. The rear of the house includes a fenced backyard with a large cylindrical water tank, a small shed, and a patio area with outdoor seating. Windows are arranged in neat rows on both floors, and the house is bordered by a mix of palm and deciduous trees. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, making it suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A beige two-story house with white-trimmed windows, a flat roof, landscaped front yard, and a fenced backyard with a water tank and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, landscaped yard, and two prominent trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof beams, plain wall, and partial view of the backyard with patio and water tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, large cylindrical water tank, small shed, and patio seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall, visible roof beams, and landscaping with palm trees in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with white door, small steps, and flanked by decorative landscaping
